backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (User, Review, Message), storage maps, and shared/query functions for user profiles, reviews, messaging, and provider search with authorization via AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping each product feature (splash screen, auth, home screen, provider profile, etc.) to the frontend/backend files and components that implement them, along with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON object containing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of each component, page, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the TrampoMZ Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing client-side routing via AppRoute state, splash screen timing, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal display, and rendering all page screens within the Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/CategoryIcon.tsx: Reusable button component that renders a Lucide icon and label for a service category, with highlighted styling when selected.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo and user avatar dropdown menu, a main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar for Home and Messages routes.
frontend/src/components/PremiumBadge.tsx: Renders a small or medium-sized 'Premium' badge with a crown icon and gold gradient styling, used to indicate premium users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects new user profile information (name, phone, location, profession, provider status) and saves it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProviderCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card for a service provider showing their avatar, name, profession, rating, review count, location, and premium status.
frontend/src/components/ReviewItem.tsx: Renders a single review entry with the reviewer's avatar/initials, star rating, comment, and formatted date fetched from their profile.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: A reusable star rating component supporting read-only display or interactive selection across three sizes (sm, md, lg).
frontend/src/components/ThreadItem.tsx: Renders a clickable messaging thread list item showing the other user's avatar, name, profession, last message preview, and timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence across page reloads, and status tracking via a React context and AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, providers, reviews, and messages via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins and Inter fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm African-themed color palette (terracotta, gold, forest green) for both light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationScreen.ts: Chat screen component that displays messages between two users in a thread, supports sending new messages via Enter key or button, and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/pages/HomeScreen.tsx: Home screen with a hero search bar and category filter chips that displays a filtered, sorted list of service providers, with premium providers ranked first.
frontend/src/pages/InboxScreen.tsx: Inbox screen that lists all message threads for the authenticated user, resolving the other participant from message data and rendering each thread with its last message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen with an Internet Identity authentication flow, featuring a branded hero section with feature highlights and a bottom card containing the login/logout button.
frontend/src/pages/ProviderProfileScreen: Provider profile screen showing a service provider's details, average star rating, and reviews, with buttons to start a conversation or leave a review.
frontend/src/pages/ReviewScreen.tsx: A review submission page where users can rate a service provider with 1–5 stars and an optional comment, then submit via the useSubmitReview hook with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/SplashScreen.tsx: A full-screen animated splash screen displaying the TrampoMZ logo, app name, and pulsing dots over a gradient background, shown briefly on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Poppins/Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations (fade-in, splash-fade, accordion) for the TrampoMZ UI.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing TrampoMZ's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for a Mozambican mobile-first PWA connecting service providers with clients.
